description: TDD engine lifecycle hooks. Verification-first, cross-platform.

hooks.prompt:
DOMAIN: tdd-system
IF task involves: bug fixing, feature implementation, refactoring, test writing, or validating AI output
THEN: Read ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/SKILL.md — verification-first is mandatory.
RULE: Write the failing test BEFORE the fix. Never claim done without passing tests.
IF_SKIP: Risk shipping untested code.

VERIFY: If code was written or modified this session, were tests run? Did they pass?
IF_NO_TESTS: This is a verification gap. Continue and add test coverage.
IF_TESTS_NOT_RUN: Run them before completing.
